_note: SYNTHETIC adverse-media corpus, hand-authored June 6 for demo polish (§5.5). NOT real reporting about real people. Tied to personas by canonical name so the adverse-media sub-agent has prose to summarize.

articles.title: Cyprus trader named in alleged sanctions-evasion network
articles.body: A Limassol-based trading consultant, Viktor Nazarov, was named in filings describing a network that allegedly routed dual-use goods through shell entities to circumvent international sanctions. The filings remain unproven and no charges have been confirmed.

articles.title: State official faces questions over undisclosed property holdings
articles.body: A mid-level state government official, Rajesh Kumar Singh, faced local scrutiny over property holdings reportedly inconsistent with declared income. The matter was described as under preliminary review.
